<?php /** * Extensions * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * Extensions * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class Extensions { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'min' => 1, // technically, it's MAX, but we'll assume anything < 0 is MAX 'max' => -1, // if 'children' isn't an array then 'min' and 'max' must be defined 'children' => Extension::MAP ]; }
